mean_en: (of people or their behaviour) attractive and showing a good sense of style; (of clothes, places and things) attractive and designed well; (of a plan or an idea) clever but simple
sentence: The ballet dancer is incredibly elegant.
sentence_trans: 这位芭蕾舞演员非常优雅。
word_etyma: e出 + leg选择，收集 + ant形容词后缀 → 选出的 → elegant好的，高雅的
